ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tactics" (
  "tactic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tactic */,
  "idAI_Tactics" INTEGER /* Reference ID for the tactic in the AI system */,
  "iList_Cell" TEXT /* Cell used for list representation (coordinates) */,
  "iList_idAI_Character_Role_Types" TEXT /* Character role types associated with the tactic */,
  "iRosterNumber" INTEGER /* Roster number indicating the character position */,
  "Attack_idAI_Character_Roles" TEXT /* Attack roles associated with the character */,
  "Defense_idAI_Character_Roles" TEXT /* Defense roles associated with the character */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level for the tactic */,
  "tactic_name" TEXT /* Name of the tactic */,
  "tactic_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the tactic */,
  "tactic_type" TEXT /* Type of tactic (e.g., offensive, defensive, support) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the tactic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the tactic */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tactic */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the tactic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tactic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tactics_Attack_idAI_Character_Roles FOREIGN KEY ("Attack_idAI_Character_Roles") REFERENCES character_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tactics_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tactics_Defense_idAI_Character_Roles FOREIGN KEY ("Defense_idAI_Character_Roles") REFERENCES character_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tactics_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the character role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role's capabilities */,
  "role_type" TEXT /* Type of role (e.g., melee, ranged, support) */,
  "role_icon" TEXT /* Icon or image associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_roles_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID indicating the character's role */,
  "health" INTEGER /* Health points of the character */,
  "attack" INTEGER /* Attack power of the character */,
  "defense" INTEGER /* Defense power of the character */,
  "character_icon" TEXT /* Icon or image associated with the character */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Current level of the character */,
  "experience_points" INTEGER /* Experience points accumulated by the character */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the character was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the character */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the character */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_characters_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES character_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_characters_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_characters_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "combat_scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each combat scenario */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the combat scenario */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the scenario */,
  "difficulty_level" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the scenario */,
  "scenario_type" TEXT /* Type of scenario (e.g., boss fight, ambush, siege) */,
  "scenario_icon" TEXT /* Icon or image associated with the scenario */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the scenario was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the scenario */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the scenario */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the scenario */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_combat_scenarios_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_combat_scenarios_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tactic_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tactic usage entry */,
  "tactic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tactic being used */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scenario where the tactic is applied */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tactic was used */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Success rate of the tactic in that scenario */,
  "usage_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the tactic was used */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who used the tactic (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the usage entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the usage entry */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the usage entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the usage entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tactic_usage_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES combat_scenarios ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tactic_usage_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tactic_usage_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tactic_usage_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tactic_usage_tactic_id FOREIGN KEY ("tactic_id") REFERENCES tactics ("tactic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, tester, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tactic_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tactic_category_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "tactic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tactic */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tactic_category_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES tactic_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tactic_category_mapping_tactic_id FOREIGN KEY ("tactic_id") REFERENCES tactics ("tactic_id")
)
